news.t: Strive Launches Actively Managed Fixed Income Funds That Prioritize Maximizing Shareholder Value

overview.description: The Strive Total Return Bond ETF (STXT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in a wide range of debt securities from issuers around the world, of any credit quality and maturity. The funds objective is to maximize total return. STXT was launched on Aug 10, 2023 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: Strive Launches Actively Managed Fixed Income Funds That Prioritize Maximizing Shareholder Value
data.text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Strive, an asset management firm on a mission to maximize shareholder value by leading companies to focus on excellence, is proud to announce the launch of its first a...
